understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to place every selectable piece onto a goal tile simultaneously across multiple levels, with a limited step budget per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the currently selected piece by 3-pixel steps. CLICK attempts to switch control to another selectable piece at the given pixel coordinates. Walls can block movement and pushing. Pushing can occur when a pushable object is adjacent in the movement direction. Heuristic movement_blocked flags are not always accurate. In some levels, pieces can be blocked from reaching certain positions by invisible barriers or geometry, making some selectables unreachable.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to place every selectable piece onto a goal tile simultaneously across multiple levels, with a limited step budget per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the currently selected piece by 3-pixel steps. CLICK attempts to switch control to another selectable piece at the given pixel coordinates. Walls can block movement and pushing. Pushing can occur when a pushable object is adjacent in the movement direction. Heuristic movement_blocked flags are not always accurate. In some levels, pieces can be blocked from reaching certain positions by invisible barriers or geometry, making some selectables unreachable.
